caption:
Late nights are when the campus truly comes alive, and for me, they’re when the magic happens. 🌙

I adjusted my silk blouse, feeling the fabric stretch slightly against my curves as I leaned back in the leather chair of my office. The lecture hall was empty, save for the soft hum of the refrigerator and the flickering light of my desk lamp. Usually, I keep the office door closed to maintain focus, but tonight, the air felt charged with something more than just textbooks and deadlines.

The silk of my blouse brushed against my skin, cool and smooth, a contrast to the warmth of the room. My skirt felt snug, the elastic waistband digging in just enough to remind me of every curve beneath it. The blazer buttons were slightly unhooked, not enough to be risky, just enough to suggest the heat rising within. I knew the student who stopped by would notice. He walked in with a stack of papers, eyes lingering a moment too long on the way I shifted. I offered him a smile that wasn’t quite academic.

"You’re late for the review," I purred, my voice dropping an octave.

The clock ticked past midnight. The coffee was warm, the mood electric. We moved from the desk to the couch, where the conversation blurred into something deeper. It wasn’t just about the essay anymore; it was about the connection we shared beyond the syllabus.

#UniversityLife #ProfessorSecrets #NightOwl #CurvesInClass #AcademicRomance #InstaTeacher #LateNightStudy #ElegantSeduction
